public static class HangfireExtensions

Methods

| Edit this page View Source

UseTenantJobFilter(IGlobalConfiguration, IServiceProvider)

Adds TenantJobFilter to the Hangfire global configuration pipeline. Call this inside your AddHangfire configuration block:

services.AddHangfire((sp, config) =>
{
    config.UseSqlServerStorage(...);
    config.UseTenantJobFilter(sp);
});
Declaration
public static IGlobalConfiguration UseTenantJobFilter(this IGlobalConfiguration configuration, IServiceProvider serviceProvider)
Parameters
Type Name Description
IGlobalConfiguration configuration
IServiceProvider serviceProvider
Returns
Type Description
IGlobalConfiguration
| Edit this page View Source

WithHangfireJobs(MultitenancyBuilder)

Registers tenant-aware Hangfire services:

  • TenantJobFilter — propagates tenant context into jobs
  • TenantJobActivator — resolves jobs from per-tenant DI scope
  • TenantRecurringJobManager — schedules jobs per tenant

You still need to call services.AddHangfire(...) and services.AddHangfireServer() separately with your storage configuration (SQL Server, Redis, etc.).

Declaration
public static MultitenancyBuilder WithHangfireJobs(this MultitenancyBuilder builder)
Parameters
Type Name Description
MultitenancyBuilder builder
Returns
Type Description
MultitenancyBuilder
